title: Resume Q&A overview
body: Resume Q&A is a practical RAG assistant. It collects user intent, searches the local knowledge base, and returns a short answer with next actions.

title: User onboarding
body: Ask for the user's goal, constraints, available files, and preferred output format. Keep answers specific, cite the matched source titles, and suggest one concrete next step.

title: Quality checklist
body: A useful assistant should validate inputs, explain assumptions, handle empty requests, and provide deterministic output that can be covered by tests.

title: Escalation rule
body: When confidence is low, ask one focused follow-up question. When confidence is high, produce a direct answer, a plan, and a validation checklist.
